data.name: My Giant Sexy Sensei Bullies Me 8
data.detailed_description:
After Kirita's beatdown, you wake up in Yuna's living room to discover that Yuna's recovered quite a bit, but that she's still too sick to dominate you. Fortunately for you, both she and Kirita has an idea on how they can relieve your masochistic urges while also solving another one of their worries, Hinata. As it turns out, Hinata has been depressed recently because she lost interest in her only source of stress relief, so she has no way to release her pent-up stress for her grueling studies, fortunately for her, Kirita and Yuna has the perfect stress relief option for her, a human punching bag.

Experience a day of being dominated by Hinata, your shy, nerdy, introverted, geeky classmate who is super into BDSM and has a ton of pent up stress.

  • ~3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 17 Unique character images

  • 19 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Experience a day of being dominated by Hinata, your shy, nerdy, introverted, geeky classmate who is super into BDSM and has a ton of pent up stress.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
